meaning: adj.少女的,少女似的(男孩),适于女子的
examples: She gave a little girlish giggle.
She had entirely lost her girlish chubbiness.
Redefine my girlish notions of romance.
Cultivate the hard g's of the Gazan dialect if you don't want to sound girlish.
Susan Hilferty's costumes had the Duke looking dashing, Rigoletto frumpy and Gilda girlish.
